summary: Clear audience recording with audible Keith Godchaux and solid vocals, though occasional cuts interrupt an otherwise enjoyable performance.
review: Both reviewers praise this master AUD tape for its clear vocal placement and prominent Keith contributions, calling it a keeper and a gem. The only technical drawback noted is the presence of various cuts that affect continuity, but overall the tape delivers a satisfying listening experience even without detailed song commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive reviews (4‑ and 5‑star) highlight good audio clarity and strong keyboard presence, offset only by mentions of cuts; limited detail on performance keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Vocals are clear and not distant, keyboards sit well in the mix; however, several audible cuts interrupt the flow of the tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers focus on audio qualities rather than specific set details; no comments on song sequence or pacing.

band_member_comments.Keys: Keith Godchaux's keyboard work is highlighted throughout the tape.
